series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains orders from a court, an attorney, or other authoritative entity that commands appearance and/or testimony in court, at hearing, or at deposition, or commands production of documents or other items.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain subpoenas that command appearance until fulfilled. Retain all other subpoenas and responsive records for six (6) months from date of compliance. ; Electronic: Retain subpoenas that command appearance until fulfilled. Retain all other subpoenas and responsive records for six (6) months from date of compliance, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
